repos.descriptionZh: 开源 CapCut 替代方案

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
repos.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
repos.descriptionZh: 您可以实际运行 100 多个 AI Agent 和 RAG 应用程序 — 克隆、自定义、发布。

repos.name: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
repos.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
repos.descriptionZh: OfficeCLI 是第一个也是最好的 Office 套件，专为 AI 代理构建，用于读取、编辑和自动化 Word、Excel 和 PowerPoint 文件。免费、开源、单一二进制文件，无需安装 Office。

repos.name: mattpocock/skills
repos.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
repos.descriptionZh: 真正工程师的技能。直接来自我的 .agents 目录。

repos.name: kangarooking/cangjie-skill
repos.description: 把书、长视频、播客等高价值内容蒸馏成可执行的 Agent Skills
repos.descriptionZh: 把书籍、长视频、播客等高价值内容提升为执行人员的技能

repos.name: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
repos.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
repos.descriptionZh: 这是 Claude 的 MCP 服务器，为其提供终端控制、文件系统搜索和 diff 文件编辑功能

repos.name: openai/codex
repos.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
repos.descriptionZh: 在您的终端中运行的轻量级编码代理

repos.name: openinterpreter/openinterpreter
repos.description: A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3
repos.descriptionZh: 适用于 Kimi K3 等开放模型的编码代理

repos.name: stablyai/orca
repos.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
repos.descriptionZh: Orca 是与一组并行代理一起工作的 ADE。使用您自己的订阅运行任何编码代理。可在桌面和移动设备上使用。

repos.name: Graphify-Labs/graphify
repos.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
repos.descriptionZh: AI 编码助手技能（Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode、Cursor、Gemini CLI 等）。将任何代码、SQL 架构、R 脚本、shell 脚本、文档、论文、图像或视频文件夹转换为可查询的知识图谱。一张图中的应用程序代码+数据库架构+基础设施。
